title: vaccinium angustifolium var. nigrum
intro: Vaccinium angustifolium var. nigrum, also known as black crowberry, is a variety of the narrow-leaved blueberry plant, native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Vaccinium angustifolium var. nigrum include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection and potential anti-cancer properties. Black crowberry can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or syrup, and is also used in traditional medicine and as a food ingredient, particularly in jams and preserves.
